config.name: microsoft_eventhub_azure_signin_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: microsoft_eventhub_azure_signin_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:09:26.712851

-- Pre-compile frequently used patterns
local PATTERNS = {
    email = "^[%w%.%-]+@[%w%.%-]+%.%w+$",
    ip = "^%d+%.%d+%.%d+%.%d+$"
}

-- Cached field mappings for performance
local FIELD_MAPPINGS = {
    -- Core fields
    time = "access_activity.time",
    resourceId = "resource.account_uid", 
    operationName = "api.operation",
    category = "event.type",
    tenantId = "tenant.uid",
    
    -- User fields
    userPrincipalName = "user.email_addr",
    userDisplayName = "user.name",
    userId = "user.uid",
    userType = "user.type",
    
    -- Device fields 
    deviceId = "device.uid",
    operatingSystem = "device.os",
    browser = "device.browser",
    
    -- Network fields
    callerIpAddress = "src.ip.address",
    
    -- Authentication fields
    authenticationProtocol = "authentication.auth_protocol",
    authenticationRequirement = "authentication.auth_requirement"
}

-- Local helper functions for performance
local function validate_ip(ip)
    if not ip then return nil end
    return string.match(ip, PATTERNS.ip) and ip or nil
end

local function validate_email(email)
    if not email then return nil end
    return string.match(email, PATTERNS.email) and email or nil
end

local function safe_copy(src, dest, field_name, target_field)
    if src[field_name] then
        dest[target_field] = src[field_name]
        return true
    end
    return false
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 300201,
        metadata = {},
        time = record.time or os.time() * 1000,
        
        -- Initialize nested structures
        user = {},
        device = {},
        src = {},
        authentication = {},
        access_activity = {}
    }

    -- Process core fields
    for src_field, dest_field in pairs(FIELD_MAPPINGS) do
        safe_copy(record, output, src_field, dest_field)
    end

    -- Special handling for critical fields
    if record.userPrincipalName then
        output.user.email_addr = validate_email(record.userPrincipalName)
    end
    
    if record.callerIpAddress then
        output.src.ip.address = validate_ip(record.callerIpAddress)
    end

    -- Process device details if present
    if record.deviceDetail and type(record.deviceDetail) == "table" then
        local device = record.deviceDetail
        output.device = {
            uid = device.deviceId,
            os = device.operatingSystem,
            browser = device.browser,
            risk_detail = device.riskDetail,
            risk_level = device.riskLevelAggregated,
            risk_state = device.riskState
        }
    end

    -- Process location if present
    if record.location and type(record.location) == "table" then
        output.location = {
            city = record.location.city,
            country = record.location.countryOrRegion,
            region = record.location.state
        }
    end

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.time or not output.class_uid then
        return nil, "Missing required fields"
    end

    return output
end

-- Error recovery wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string.format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
